content: What covs does Clem benefit from?

Hey! Im planning on pulling on Castor and Pollux, using the event selector on Kath, and maybe skip Pickman, Clem and Doresain (If I dont get Castor and Pollux). Got already GDoll and Corpo. Is this a good plan or should I change something?

keyflare or the strike covenant is also good(forgot what it's called it's a low lvl one in interlude that gives you a strike every turn, lets you always have a cheap card to quasar for str stacking+get an attack for her psy stacks)
ah, Twisted Twins Black

some of these chars need dupes to work well, if going for castor and pollux you'd probably want E3 pollux and E0 castor or E3 both if possible. Same for Kath she wants E3. It's better to focus pulls on fewer chars to make a strong team for story clears than to pick one of everything
also did you mean either of these ones when talking about keyflare?
Oh, I see. Thought it was better to at least have one and then build them up with horizons. Ty!
right one, this is the main keyflare covenant and basically you run it in every team on one char. Left one is for some characters only

it's fine to build them up with Horizons but that takes time so it'd be better to focus some pulls into a DPS to progress the story and then build the rest, but I guess it depends on how many pulls you have, there's still one week of reruns after the current one though so if you can progress a bunch you might be able to pull more after
Ive got gmurphy e2, tawil e1, caecus oe and goliath oe as my story team for now  (im in Chap5), so I thought I should at least get them before the reruns stop haha
Why the raid mode lag so much
I f*ck*ng hate when I run out of rose script.
Huh. That didn't come out how I expected.
how many dupes of castor is recommended, and do i get his wod?
Do you plan to use him as a carry/core? E3. If not E0 is fine. His WOD is great too.

either that, or i could instead just pull for his wod and then get his dupes with monthly shop...

might as well get back to saving now
What do i use this for? :0
in the archive, if you go to images and such, i think you can use them to unlock some arts and such
OHHH
Better use of it is to unlock side stories
other than that you can use them to unlock stories in the main story tab under the other ones
Side stories give you new posses and standard pulls
which of them are the side stories? :3
2nd, 3rd, and 4th tab
ahh okie :)
last one is affinity reward upon reaching 10 affection with a awakener
you can use 1 reality verge to unlock their affection story
but you do need to reach chapter 7 (?) of main story to unlock the feature
Most recommended one to unlock first is Miryam side story for the generically strong posse and its length gives a lot of standard pulls
ohh thank you all for your help!! :3
After that you can unlock side stories for character specific posses

If you care about the lore here is the recommended unlock order
https://docs.google.com/document/d/1K72xeUFXunaR8WqwEN1YyEPVyd09q71KJHoBKROhoho/edit?tab=t.0

embeds.title: Niko's Event Unlock Recommendations
embeds.description: Since the in-game side story list is not in chronological order, this is a spoiler-free list of side stories I recommend to those interested in the lore of Morimens to read and in what order.  This list is also a spoiler-free companion list to my (spoiler full) Morimens timeline project, where I ...

uhh, for the most part people use them 3 ways
1) emergency stamina stock to urgently farm mats when they want to immediately build a character for some reason
2) dump it all into events for mats/stamps

the exact ratio varies per event but ~generally~ speaking, as long as you have a decent level of event reward bonus, the value you get overall from dumping the stam in an event will get you more than you get from farming covenants or mat stages

I'm not sure if it's beneficial enough to spend those in the event...dunno, I'm bad at math, but I mainly need XP Bottles, skill/edifying materials for Chaos and skill/edifying materials for Ultra. Well Seals are always nice to get.
So that requires me to farm the last level to get the incense for all 3 pages
I should have like 90% I guess. E0 GMurphy/her wheel and maxed SR event's wheel.
yeah the lootbox events are a bit less value because the best efficiency is generally the last stage for all 3 box mats, but that gives you an even split of each box
and if you're target farming specific mats, that ends up being less value per stam
mats like the recent ryker or tawil reruns are generally the best for target farming so you get a ton of purple mats and you can target farm specific stages
The question is when do we farm the covenants....events are usually one after another, the current one was an exception since GMurphy was delayed. Getting Seals from event only takes an eternity.

like for me, for example, it's 120 stamina for 4320 gmurphy box mats, plus some variance in bonus mats per run
each of the boxes is 14250 mats to clean out, meaning you get 28 stamps per cycle, which comes ~14 stamina per stamp on average plus the mats in each box
I formed those sets for now (all with best main stats). So I need Aprit Praise within those I can farm and Seals to upgrade all of that to +12.
farming covenants directly is 20 per stage entry to get 1-3 stamps? so likely ~10 stam/stamp? i'm not sure since I've never tracked the droprates on it
Less Value for now, but it's gonna be needed later on once I start building Caro/Aequor teams, so not that much of a loss either.
so on a 1:1 it's worse than farming only for stamps, but with the exp/skill/edify mats included from the boxes, you're spending probably like half overall to not be able to target farm
Yeah, but we get all the rewards without using stamina boxes and the only thing that is left at the end is rose scrips.
though whenever we get the shop style events with the target farm stages those are usually just straight up directly better by a vast margin
no, the stages themselves give purple drops
like, each fight of the event dropped 20+ purple mats
that's the point of stamina dumping on those events, the actual shop currency you get from it is w/e
Oh yea, forgot about those for some reason
Uh GMurphy Mats? Are we talking about current event's incense?
yeah
At this point no matter what the event is, we never go to interlude?
I've seen only Tawil event and GMurphy one so far
yeah it's easy to overlook but it's honestly a tremendous amount, it's like 20+ purple mats per 120 stam in those events vs like 1-3 purple mats per 20stam run of the mat dungeons
interlude is mostly just for emergencies
optimally speaking, you never want to use stam on interlude because events will pretty much always be better value
but sometimes you wake up at 4am and decide you really, *really* need to invest in agrippa *right now* and you have none of her mats and it's not worth spending 10k stamina on lootboxes to get enough
so interlude it is

There's no sense to farm anything but the last stage, right? I mean even if we don't currently need some kind of mat, we will need it in the future either way, meaning that no matter what you farm, it will go to 0 within a certain period of time.
yeah
you'd have to run the numbers to figure out if it's worth farming the single mat stages but i'm preeeetty sure it isn't?
the amount of mats you get is just so much lower
I wonder if farming events only is the case if you decide to skip a featured awakener + wheel.
It's basically only 50% increase due to SR wheel then
My brain can't handle math calculations, so I'm asking more experienced players in case they've ever checked that.
is faros' dmg amplification only for herself, for lemurians, or for the entire team?
entire team
DMG Amplification is always a team-wide stat
and does it increase tentacle dmg
<@88644018673582080> have you ever checked that? I guess you always pull for a new awakener, but what if...<:takenotes:1357186646294138890>
yes
i'll need to check the values for lootbox-style events
for shop-style events, it always is because the % boost doesn't apply to the purple mat drops
here's an example from ryker event
Yeah it was the same amount for Tawil's event

that's 120 stam for 24 purple exp mats + 80,640k scrips from shop via the tradeins

comparatively, exp interlude is 20 stam for 2 purple, 2 blue, 8 green, and 6k scrips
doing that 6x gets you 12 purple, 12 blue (2.4 purples), 48 green (2.4 purples), so a net total of 16.8 purple exp mats and 36k scrips
Well...ping me if you will have a desire to check the values for 50% increase only for box-style events. <:A_pinch:1432980538536493057>
so yeah it's 1.5x better to do the shop events
for lootboxes, the base value is the same (576 x3 + some variance), i'll ignore the variance, though to be fair it is fairly significant just getting an extra like 20% for free
that's 2592 mats per 120 stamina with 50% bonus
one lootbox is 14,250 mats to clean out, so using the exp one as a reference (and just assuming the others are similar in terms of value ratio)
that comes to ~660 stamina to get 28 seals, 16 purple exp, 80 blue exp (16 purple), 192 green exp (9.6 purple), plus 270k scrips

so that comes to 28 seals + 41.6 purple + 270k scrips for 660 stam
the equivalent of interlude would give 0 seals + 92.4 purple + 198k scrips
i guess for comparison you would be farming covenant interludes with some of that stam to convert to stamps as well
which...I don't have the numbers on, hmm
but at least from a direct comparison it's not obviously better than interludes at 50%
Hmm so basically if the increase is only 50%, it's better to grab the special rewards and switch to farming Interlude's covenant or XP Bottles/anything else depending on your needs?
I think so yeah

Thanks a lot for your time and calculations <:Cheerup:1400771555939844149> 
To conclude: 
Farming shop-like events is always the best no matter what.
Farming lootbox type of events isn't that worth at 50% increase.
Farming lootbox type of events with 90% bonus is alright.
I would never be able to do those calculations by myself, I'd been slacking on math classes <:A_pinch:1432980538536493057> Thanks a lot

Does Aurita's exalt stack infinitely? Or it just make it maximum 2 hit instances?
Dont really know what you mean, but when exalted she puts out all of the 0 cost cards (more than 2 hits if you loaded up the deck).
Guys who should I choose from the selector?
it said "provides 1 more DMG instance" so i'm wondering if it stack or just mean 2 hit instance since it's originally 1 hit
yeah it adds a hit, this is how she scales damage really high eventually with lots of small hits+red tentacle hits
so it stack?

yes it "stacks" since it says it does 1 hit per 1cards exhausted, but it's just for the exalt. However in arc2 with soulforge, she also has a permanent stacking additional hit on glands for every 20 glands used
Her exalt doesn't add damage instances to gland division, it adds hits to her ult per gland division
ah ok i understand now
